description.content: Operations for managing Engage flows
Retrieves a list of all available Engage flows. Results can be filtered by flow owner email and workspace, and are paginated.

query.description: Filter flows by the owner's email address.
A cursor for pagination. Pass the cursor from the previous response to retrieve the next page of results.

response.name: Successful response containing a list of Engage flows.

Operations for managing flow folders
Retrieves all company flow folders, plus personal flow folders and flow folders shared with the specified user. Used to organize and categorize Engage flows.

query.description: Email of the user to include personal and shared folders for.

response.name: Successful response containing flow folders.

Operations for managing prospects in Engage flows

item.name: Gong Assign prospects to Engage flow

request.name: Gong Assign prospects to Engage flow

description.content: Assigns one or more prospects to a specified Engage flow. Prospects will begin receiving the flow's outreach sequence upon assignment.

response.name: Prospects successfully assigned to the flow.

item.name: Gong Unassign prospects from Engage flow

request.name: Gong Unassign prospects from Engage flow

description.content: Removes one or more prospects from specified Engage flows. You can remove prospects from up to 100 flows in a single request. The response returns the flow instance IDs the prospect was successfully removed from.

response.name: Prospects successfully unassigned from the flow.

The Gong Engage API lets you manage and customize Engage flows at scale, with endpoints to list available flows and folders, assign or unassign prospects, and override flow content to tailor messaging for specific campaigns or workflows.
